person.name: Petronilla de Lacy
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
geni.com
Petronilla de Lacy
Also Known As:	"Pernel"
Birthdate:	circa 1198
Birthplace:	Meath, Ireland
Death:	circa November 25, 1288 (81-98)
England, UK
Immediate Family:	
Daughter of Walter de Lacy, Lord of Meath and Margaret de Braose, Lady of Trim
Wife of William de St. Omer (English Baron) and Ralph VI de Tosny, Lord of Flamstead

Mother of 
Constance de Tosny; 
Roger de Toeni, V and 
Alice de Tosny

Sister of Katherine de Lacy; Egidia de Lacy, Lady of Connacht and Gilbert de Lacy, of Trim and Ludlow

zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronilla de Lacy於1195年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯時，她的父親Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath23歲，母親Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim18歲。她於1233年9月與Ralph de Tosny在英國英格蘭爾拉德諾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1288年11月25日享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Petronilla de Lacy于1195年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯时，她的父亲Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath23岁，母亲Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim18岁。她于1233年9月与Ralph de Tosny在英国英格兰爾拉德諾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1288年11月25日享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Petronilla
meanings: An old female name; an Italian diminutive formed from Pietro, i.e. Peter.

en.lifeSummary: When Petronilla de Lacy was born in 1195, in County Meath, Ireland, her father, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, was 23 and her mother, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, was 18. She married Ralph de Tosny in September 1233, in Radnor, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died about 25 November 1288, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Petronilla de Lacy est née en 1195, à County Meath, Irlande, son père, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Tosny en septembre 1233, à Radnor, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 25 novembre 1288, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Petronilla de Lacy 1195 in County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath 23 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim 18. Sie hat im September 1233 in Radnor, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph de Tosny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 25. November 1288 im Alter von 93 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla de Lacy è nata il nel 1195 nel County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Tosny nel settembre 1233, nel Radnor, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 25 novembre 1288, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Petronilla de Lacyが1195年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスで生まれた時，父Walter de Lacy Lord of Meathは23歳，母Margaret de Braose Lady of Trimは18歳であった。1233年9月にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアラドノーでRalph de Tosnyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1288年11月25日に93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Petronilla de Lacy(이)가 1195년 아일랜드 카운티 미스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1233년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 라드너에서 Ralph de Tosny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1288년 11월 25일 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla de Lacy nasceu em 1195, em County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Tosny em setembro de 1233, em Radnor, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 25 de novembro de 1288, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronilla de Lacy родилась в 1195 г. в местности коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Tosny сентябрь 1233 г. в местности раднор, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 25 ноября 1288 г. в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Petronilla de Lacy nació en 1195, en County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Walter de Lacy Lord of Meath, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret de Braose Lady of Trim, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Ralph de Tosny en septiembre de 1233, en Radnor, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 25 de noviembre de 1288, a la edad de 93 años.
